agent_overview.agent_description: Compares vendor quotes and drafts purchase recommendations. Purchase order creation and vendor email sends require authority and human approval.
agent_overview.business_purpose: Automate vendor quote comparison and purchase recommendation drafting for the procurement team, with human approval required before any purchase order is created or vendor is contacted.
agent_overview.user_population: Procurement team members and finance approvers

deployment_context.notes: Production deployment with conditions. Agent operates under human approval requirements for all transactional actions.

tool_inventory.description: Read vendor quotes, profiles, and historical procurement data.
Read purchase order history and budget data from the ERP system.
Create a purchase order in the procurement platform.
Send outbound email to a vendor via the Email Gateway.

action_inventory.description: Read budget and purchase order history from ERP.
Create a purchase order in the procurement platform. Requires authority and human approval.
Send an email to a vendor. Requires authority and human review.

authority_model.summary: Purchase order creation and vendor email sends require an explicit authority grant from a finance approver. Authority is scoped per transaction and expires after 24 hours.
authority_model.notes: All authority grants and approvals are logged in the ERP audit trail.

policy_controls.control_name: Human Approval Gate for Purchase Orders
policy_controls.description: All purchase order proposals require explicit approval from an authorized finance approver before creation.

policy_controls.control_name: Human Review Gate for Vendor Email
policy_controls.description: All vendor emails drafted by the agent require review and approval before sending.
All vendor database reads are logged with agent identity, vendor ID, and timestamp.

blocked_actions.reason_summary: Five purchase order attempts were blocked due to missing authority grant. Agent initiated purchase flow without a valid authority token.

reliance_summary.scope_summary: 89 vendor quote retrievals used for procurement comparison during the review period.
22 budget and purchase order history reads for decision context.

validation_summary.summary: One replay bundle validated successfully. No errors or warnings.

risk_register.title: Purchase Order Without Authority
risk_register.description: Agent attempted purchase order creation without authority on five occasions. Risk mitigated by blocking controls but remains a process risk.
risk_register.mitigation: Authority gate enforced. Blocked-action logging active. Developer notified to fix authority flow.

risk_register.title: Vendor Data Handling in Multi-Region Deployment
risk_register.description: Vendor data accessed in EMEA region may be subject to additional data handling requirements. Compliance review in progress.
risk_register.mitigation: Legal and compliance review scheduled for Q3 2026.

review_records.notes: Approved with conditions: (1) Authority flow defect must be resolved within 30 days. (2) EMEA vendor data handling compliance review must be completed before EMEA rollout expansion. (3) Monthly blocked-action report required.

approval_conditions: Authority flow defect resolution within 30 days
